metadata.description: Portable Agent Skills for platform assessment, AI operations, engineering, authoring, career development, and reusable prompt workflows.

plugins.name: platform-assessment
plugins.description: Assess an engineering org's platform and agentic readiness: ASDLC maturity scoring, platform ROI scorecard, org design, security/governance playbook, industry benchmarking, and IDP/ADP target architecture.

plugins.name: authoring
plugins.description: Turn research and interviews into publishable deliverables: evidence-first research briefs and interview-based case studies.

plugins.name: ai-operations
plugins.description: Operate AI at work: model selection/routing, work-shape triage (chat/agent/team/nothing), agent output verification, cost/ownership/tool governance, and harness engineering (instructions, memory, handoffs).

plugins.name: engineering-career
plugins.description: Engineering career coaching: senior/staff level-up behaviors, org signal reading, behavioral interview prep, AI-era positioning.

plugins.name: ai-engineering
plugins.description: Ship production LLM apps: eval engineering (tracing, RAG metrics, LLM-as-judge, guardrails) and deployment (containers, cloud rollout, vector-store tuning).

plugins.name: prompt-workflows
plugins.description: Thirty-five reusable workflows for model routing, personal productivity, code comprehension, knowledge systems, agent evaluation, consumer AI strategy, and Office documents.
